raw_title: Book Review: ‘Take Me With You,’ by Steven Rowley
book_title: ‘Take Me With You,’ by Steven Rowley
description: Steven Rowley’s new novel, “Take Me With You,” asks who we are without our partners.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Attention-Seeking Behavior,’ by Aea Varfis-van Warmelo
description: Aea Varfis-van Warmelo’s novel follows a commitment-averse liar who is plagued by visions of violence.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Take Me to Your Leader,’ by Neil deGrasse Tyson
book_title: ‘Take Me to Your Leader,’ by Neil deGrasse Tyson
description: The popular astrophysicist can be witty and informative when making science accessible. You wouldn’t know it from his new book, “Take Me to Your Leader.”
